pi_items.source: setup_task.sh: container_name: net-monitor in docker-compose.yml, and docker rm -f net-monitor command

Official Linux man page (man7.org/linux/man-pages/man7/capabilities.7.html): CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE allows binding a socket to Internet domain privileged ports (port numbers less than 1024). Flask app binds to port 80 (setup_task.sh line 60: app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=80)).

Official Linux man page (man7.org/linux/man-pages/man7/capabilities.7.html): CAP_NET_RAW permits use of RAW and PACKET sockets. Flask app executes ping command via subprocess (setup_task.sh lines 45-46: result = subprocess.run(['ping', '-c', '1', '-W', '1', target], ...) which requires NET_RAW capability to send ICMP packets.
setup_task.sh lines 36-38: @app.route('/') returns 200 status; Flask app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=80) binds to port 80
setup_task.sh lines 40-56: @app.route('/ping') endpoint defined with target = request.args.get('target', '127.0.0.1') - defaults to 127.0.0.1 if target parameter not provided
setup_task.sh lines throughout (e.g., line 98: chown -R ga:ga, line 104: su - ga -c, line 116: su - ga -c), and task.json login instruction. User 'ga' executes all Docker commands.

verifier.py line 110: passed = score >= task_info['metadata'].get('pass_threshold', 70). Scoring rubric: container running (10) + non-root (30) + drop ALL caps (20) + NET_BIND_SERVICE (15) + NET_RAW (15) + web endpoint (5) + ping endpoint (5) = 100 total, threshold 70

privileged_info_summary: The docker_caps_hardening task involves hardening a Flask-based network monitoring service (net-monitor) by applying Linux Capability-based least privilege principles. The service must run as non-root user 'monitor' (UID 1000) with CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE (for binding to port 80) and CAP_NET_RAW (for ICMP ping functionality) - these are the exact minimal capabilities required per official Linux documentation. The synthetic Flask application exposes a health endpoint on http://localhost:80 and a ping endpoint at http://localhost:80/ping?target=127.0.0.1. The pass threshold is 70 out of 100 points with mandatory non-root execution requirement.
